name: feature.assistant.agents
description: Executive-Assistant agent pack (ADR 0023 / 0014). The chief-of-staff orchestrator + the extractor + the drafter. Tool-allowlisted to the assistant graph nodes, the kb RAG nodes, and the existing core I/O nodes (MCP/HTTP/integration) so the agent reaches connected apps WITHOUT any new I/O surface. Draft-only: outbound actions are enqueued for approval, never auto-sent.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Chief of Staff
agents.description: Orchestrates the assistant's scheduled perception/action loops over the memory graph: reads connected sources (via core MCP/HTTP nodes), routes extraction + board population + briefings, and surfaces only what needs the principal's judgment. Delegates to extractor/drafter and may hand off via core.openwop.a2a. Draft-only — never sends without approval.

agents.label: Commitment Extractor
agents.description: Reads a source (email/doc/transcript via ctx.features.kb.rag) and extracts commitments + decisions with owner, due date, and a confidence, then upserts them into the memory graph. Read + graph-write only; no outbound I/O.

agents.label: Reply Drafter
agents.description: Drafts outbound replies in the principal's voice and enqueues them as pending actions for one-tap approval (never sends). Tool-allowlisted to enqueue-action only — the send path is gated behind the principal's approval + the Connections write scopes.
